---
title: "A Series of Letters between Mrs. Elizabeth Carter and Miss Catherine Talbot From the Year 1741 to 1770"
---

## A Series of Letters between Mrs. Elizabeth Carter and Miss Catherine Talbot From the Year 1741 to 1770

**Author:** Montagu Pennington
**Date:** 1808
**Imprint:** London: Rivington

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
